nasb.text: The earth is also polluted by its inhabitants, for they transgressed laws, violated statutes, broke the everlasting covenant.

esv.text: The earth lies defiled under its inhabitants; for they have transgressed the laws, violated the statutes, broken the everlasting covenant.

cnv.text: 大地被其上的居民玷污， 因為他們犯了律法， 違了律例， 背了永遠的約。

ccb.text: 大地被世人玷污， 他们违犯律法， 不守律例，背弃永远的约。

csbs.text: 大地被其上的居民玷污， 因为他们违背律法，违犯律例， 破坏永远的约。
